block_23: 👶 Adapt your site for mobile devices
block_24: Most of the search today is mobile. If the site is not optimized for mobile devices, users will not be comfortable using it and eventually leave.
block_25: Responsive design will help solve this problem by adapting your website to the user's device. Thus, you will not have to optimize individual pages for different types of devices — the page format will automatically change depending on the screen type. block_30: Prioritize sections of your keyword map: start with pages that your website needs right away and that have the highest likelihood to result in conversions.
block_31: Optimize your content. Use keywords in the H1, URL, and metadata. Make sure your content is unique, readable, expert, and is written in the right format: blog, infographics, videos, webinars, product detail pages, presentations, case studies, comparison tables, etc.
